build.beforeDevCommand: npm run prepare:ffmpeg-sidecar && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run prepare:ffmpeg-sidecar && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1422 ws://localhost:1423; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
